name: Amass
author: Security Assessment Dashboard
description: In-depth attack surface mapping and asset discovery (OWASP Amass). Detects installation and version only in this phase — no scan is executed.

install_instructions.linux: `sudo apt install amass` (Debian/Ubuntu/Kali), `sudo dnf install amass` (Fedora/RHEL), `sudo pacman -S amass` (Arch), `snap install amass`, or `go install github.com/owasp-amass/amass/v4/...@master`. See docs/LINUX_TOOL_INSTALLATION.md for details.
